commands: crictl --runtime-endpoint unix:///run/containerd/containerd.sock ps 2>&1 | grep -i gpu-smoke 2>&1 | head -5 || true

test -n "$CID" && crictl --runtime-endpoint unix:///run/containerd/containerd.sock inspect $CID 2>&1 | python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); info=d.get("info",{}); print("runtimeType:", info.get("runtimeType")); print("runtimeOptions:", json.dumps(info.get("runtimeOptions",{}),indent=2)[:600]); cfg=d.get("status",{}); print("mounts count:", len(d.get("info",{}).get("runtimeSpec",{}).get("mounts",[]))); print("devices:", [x.get("path") for x in d.get("info",{}).get("runtimeSpec",{}).get("linux",{}).get("devices",[])])'
